violations.text: The doors to the outside, located in the gym/cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Space observed at the bottom between the 2 doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023

Utensils (spoons) in the (gym/cafeteria) observed displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

Refrigerator door gasket of the large milk chest cooler (hallway) observed in poor repair, splitting away from the door. Gasket must be replaced. In addition, dishwasher is not in good repair. Cardboard trays are being used. Serving utensils are being washed, rinsed, and sanitized using the 3-bay sink. Dishwasher is to be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the gym/cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Space observed at the bottom between the 2 doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023

Thermometer is lacking in the hallway milk cold hold unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the hallway and cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Space observed at the bottom and between the 2 doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023

Utensils(spoons) in the cafeteria are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024
Dishwasher is not working. Washing, rinsing, and sanitizing is currently being done using the 3-bay sink. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2024
Fly tape observed hanging above dishwashing area. Fly tape must be removed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2023

The doors to the outside, located in the cafeteria and hall leading to the cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023

The doors to the outside, located in the cafeteria and in the hallway, are not tight-fitting. Space observed between and at top and bottom. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023
Fly tape observed hanging over the handsink area. Fly tape must be removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2023

Utensils(spoons) in the cafeteria are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2023

The outside dumpster is not covered and trash is stacked above the top of the dumpster. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2023
